name: ticket-plugin
description: Marketplace hosting the `tickets` plugin: per-ticket tracking files for Linear / JIRA tickets, with start/pause/update/archive slash commands.

plugins.name: tickets
plugins.description: Per-ticket tracking for Linear / JIRA tickets. Slash commands (/tickets:start, /tickets:pause, /tickets:update, /tickets:archive) keep a durable per-ticket plan + findings + progress log outside the repo, and sync the plan back to the ticket on archive.
